title: paspalum ciliatum
intro: Paspalum ciliatum, also known as the hairy paspalum, is a type of tropical grass native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paspalum ciliatum include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
